title: Phunware Reports Record First Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: Phunware Reports Record First Quarter 2022 Financial Results. Key Financial Metrics: Net Revenues: $6.8 million (310% YoY growth). Platform Revenue (MaaS): $2.5 million. Hardware Revenue: $4.3 million. Net Loss: $(14.9) million. Loss per Share: $(0.15). Adjusted EBITDA Loss: $(4.2) million. Notable Statement: CEO Alan Knitowski remarked: we are thrilled to have significantly outperformed that target with a new first quarter record. The company also increased Q2 2022 revenue guidance from over 250% to over 275% year-over-year growth, projecting another second-quarter record. This represented a significant turnaround from 2021 when the company was struggling with lower revenues.
